rationale.R1.5: Proposes a clear structural reorganization by moving the contribution paragraph and improving related work citations.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively discloses uncertainties regarding prior work and evidence gaps.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors while identifying potential harms in the original content.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major edits but lacks annotations for minor changes.
